repositories.name: adreno-llms
repositories.why: SOTA small LMs tuned for Adreno 6xx GPUs on non-flagship Android phones. Pure C++/OpenCL.

repositories.name: BitNet-rs
repositories.why: Rust inference engine for 1-bit BitNet LLMs, compatible with GGUF and llama.cpp.

repositories.name: llama.cpp
repositories.why: Fork with patches for TU11x devices, useful as a reference for GPU-compatibility experiments.

repositories.name: llamacpp-gfx906-furnace
repositories.why: AMD fork with custom kernels, TurboQuant and HIP bug fixes for gfx906.

repositories.name: AMD_iGPU_AI_Setup
repositories.why: Setup and speed test repo for AMD iGPU AI using llama.cpp, ROCm and Vulkan.

repositories.name: build-llama-cpp
repositories.why: Practical notes for building and running llama.cpp on AMD hardware.
